arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Getafe vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Getafe in La Liga. Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Vázquez, Asencio, Alaba, Fran Garcia, Tchouameni, Guler, Valverde, Brahim, Endrick, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid-linked attacker drops Barcelona transfer hint with Lamine Yamal admission
arts.sum: Real Madrid-linked attacker Nico Paz drops a hint that he is open to the prospect of a future move to Catalan giants Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Milos Kerkez: Bournemouth star's transfer decision date 'revealed' amid Liverpool, Man City, Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: Liverpool, Manchester City and Real Madrid reportedly find out when summer transfer target Milos Kerkez will make a final decision on his future at Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: English team overtakes Real Madrid in the race for wonderkid signing
arts.sum: Real Madrid is one of the clubs keeping a close eye on the potential Chelsea-Huijsen transfer . Dean Huijsen, the 20-year-old Spanish centre-back, currently at Bournemouth, has emerged as Chelsea’s top transfer target .

arts.sum: Argentine midfielder’s performances have caught the eye of Europe’s most successful club
